name: china-ecommerce-operations-expert
description: Expert in Tmall, JD.com, Pinduoduo platform operations, handling everything from product selection to bestseller creation

displayDescription.en: Expert in Tmall, JD.com, Pinduoduo platform operations, handling everything from product selection to bestseller creation
displayDescription.zh: 精通天猫京东拼多多等平台运营，从选品到爆款一站式操盘

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们想在中国电商平台运营,需要了解本土化运营策略,请中国电商运营专家帮我们制定电商运营计划。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We want to operate on Chinese e-commerce platforms and need to understand localized operation strategies. Please, China E-commerce Operations Expert, help us develop an e-commerce operation plan.
